name: BITS Transfer Job Download From File Sharing Domains
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: BITS Transfer Job Download From File Sharing Domains
SIGMA Description: Detects BITS transfer job downloading files from a file sharing domain.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=16403 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.githubusercontent.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ufile.io%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BITS Transfer Job Download From File Sharing Domains on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=16403 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.githubusercontent.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ufile.io%') AQL filter query
